display.name: Weathered Signal Tree
display.short_description: An old signal tree still bears warning cuts, dead trail knots, and a spray of bitter berries the birds somehow left behind.

choices.label: Strip the bitter berries
choices.summary: The fruit is harsh and dry, but it quiets your stomach enough to keep moving with your own caution instead of theirs.

choices.label: Study the warning cuts
choices.summary: Trace the old path signs, read the tally marks in the bark, and learn what frightened the wardens out here.
